results.rendered_html:
sam-√muh P. -muhyati (pf. -mumoha, or -mumuhs), to become quite stupefied or bewildered or unconscious,  MBh. ;  R. ;  BhP. ;
to become confused or unrecognizable (as the quarters of the sky),  MBh. :
Caus. -mohayati, to stupefy, make unconscious, perplex, bewilder, lead astray,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.
